subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! Upon thee be the glory of thy Lord, the All-Glorious. He hath made mention of thee at this hour through verses whereby all realities have been enraptured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل علیک بهاء ربک الجلیل انه ذکرک فی هذا الحین بایات انجذبت بها حقائق
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement
